prompt: A cinematic close-up portrait of a young East Asian woman with long slightly messy black hair falling across her face, porcelain skin, soft pink lips, and deep expressive eyes. Moody atmosphere, minimalist composition, soft skin texture, delicate facial details, editorial beauty photography, subtle grain, muted colors, intimate and mysterious mood, ultra-realistic, high detail, captured like an artistic film still.
